indicators.name: L-shaped kitchen counter
indicators.rationale: The kitchen counter is too narrow and lacks a flat surface suitable for a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no dedicated workspace
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated area specifically designed for computer work, such as a desk or table.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting specifically designed for computer work, such as a desk lamp.

indicators.name: no dedicated storage for reference materials
indicators.rationale: There is no indication of dedicated storage for reference materials, which are often needed for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there is a kitchen counter, it is too narrow and lacks a flat surface suitable for a computer workstation. There is no dedicated workspace, ergonomic seating, task lighting, or dedicated storage for reference materials, making it challenging to set up a productive computer work environment.
